publicSiteOrgName: Yoqubkhoja Innovation Programming and Technology Center
publicCabinetDesc: Sign in to work with organizations, staff, finance, reports and documents.
publicCabinetLoginHint: Enter your username and password — your personal account will open after sign-in.
publicAboutText: Yoqubkhoja Innovation Center develops applications and provides organization management, financial reporting and official documents.
publicActivityText: News and information about the center and supervised organizations.
publicNews1: Organization management — data, staff, finance and reports on one platform.
publicNews2: Financial reports and official documents in standard forms.
publicNews3: Support for Tajik, Russian, English and Uzbek.
publicDocumentsText: Regulatory and official organization documents are available in your personal account.
publicAnnounce1: Register for cabinet access — an administrator will approve your account.
publicAnnounce2: Organization staff can edit data, HR and finance sections.
publicFooterAbout: Organization management and innovation development platform.
publicFooterCopyright: Copyright © {year}. Yoqubkhoja Innovation Programming and Technology Center — official website
publicFooterRights: All rights reserved. When using site materials, attribution is required!
publicFooterAddress: Address: Jabbor Rasulov District, Sughd Region, Republic of Tajikistan
publicGovSitePresident: President of the Republic of Tajikistan
publicGovSiteMajlisiMillii: Majlisi Milli of the Republic of Tajikistan
publicGovSiteGovernment: Government of the Republic of Tajikistan
publicGovSiteFinance: Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Tajikistan
publicGovSiteMfa: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Tajikistan
publicGovSiteStat: Statistical Agency under the President of Tajikistan
publicGovSiteEducation: Ministry of Education and Science of Tajikistan
publicGovSiteMehnat: Ministry of Labour, Migration and Employment
publicGovSiteAnticorruption: Agency for State Financial Control and Combating Corruption
userRoomSubtitle: Personal access to projects, organizations, reports and official documents.
userRoomCardProjectsDesc: Project list, apps and admin panel.
userRoomCardOrganizationsDesc: Organization data, staff, finance, reports and documents.
userRoomNoAccessHint: Contact the site administrator to request access.
registerSubtitle: After registration the site administrator grants access
registerSuccess: Registration complete. Wait for administrator approval.
registerInvalidUsername: Username: at least 3 characters, no spaces (e.g. earorov or earorov@gmail.com)
registerInvalidPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
registerReservedUsername: This username is reserved for the administrator
loginPendingApproval: Your account has not been approved yet.
loginConfigError: AUTH_SECRET is missing in Vercel. Settings → Environment Variables → Redeploy.
accessProjectsDenied: You do not have access to projects.
accessOrganizationsDenied: You do not have access to organizations.
accessContactAdmin: Contact the site administrator to request access.
adminUsersSubtitle: Approve, deny, and pick organizations and sections for each user
adminUsersSupervisionOnlyHint: Shows all sections of selected organizations; saving and edits are disabled
adminUsersSupervisionSectionsNote: In view-only mode the user can access all sections
supervisionOnlyBanner: View-only mode — you can browse data but cannot save or make changes.
adminUsersAddHint: Set login, password, status, and permissions
adminUsersResetPasswordHint: Enter a new password if it was forgotten. Leave blank to keep the current password.
adminUsersPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
adminChatSubtitle: Reply to users and handle escalations
adminChatSelectHint: Select a conversation from the list
adminChatTelegramHint: Notifications are sent to the Telegram bot
liveChatClosedHint: Chat is closed. Start a new conversation to continue.
adminTelegramStartHint: After Activate, send /start to the bot from @yoqubkhoja1988 — Chat ID is saved automatically.
heroSubtitle: All apps, websites and work in one place
innovationCenterTitle: Yoqubkhoja Center for Software Development and Innovative Technologies
noProjects: No projects yet. Add your first one!
adminDataSubtitle: Full mirror of projects, organizations, staff, finance, and sections
adminDataLoadError: Failed to load data. Please try again.
adminDataSelectCategories: Select functions for print and export
adminDataEmpty: No data for the current selection.
orgSubtitle: Grouped by economic sectors of the Republic of Tajikistan
orgSectorStateGovernanceDesc: Majlisi Oli, Government of RT, presidential agencies
orgSectorMinistriesDesc: Ministries, agencies, committees and government bodies
orgSectorLocalGovDesc: District, city, town and jamoat executive authorities
orgSectorEducationDesc: Schools, kindergartens, universities and vocational institutions
orgSectorSocialDesc: Pensions, social care, family and vulnerable groups support
orgSectorAgricultureFoodDesc: Agriculture, veterinary, phytosanitary and quality control
orgSectorIndustryDesc: Factories, plants, mines and energy organizations
orgSectorFinanceDesc: Ministry of Finance, banks, customs and financial control
orgSectorTransportDesc: Road transport, railways, postal and telecom services
orgSectorJusticeDesc: Courts, prosecutor's office, police and law enforcement
orgSectorCultureDesc: Theaters, libraries, museums, sports and tourism
orgSectorScienceDesc: Research institutes, science centers and innovation hubs
orgSectorUncategorizedDesc: Organizations not yet assigned to a sector
noOrganizations: No organizations yet. Add your first one!
orgLoadError: Could not load organizations. Refresh the page or try again later.
orgLookupError: Failed to fetch data from andoz.tj
orgLookupNotFound: No organization found for this TIN
actComingSoon: This section will be available soon.
orgInfoIntro: Enter the organization name and superior authorities for official report headers (payroll, orders, formation and financial reports).
orgInfoFieldOrganizationNameHint: If empty, the main organization name is used.
orgInfoFieldOrganizationNamesHint: Enter the official name for each language manually — automatic translation is not used.
orgContractsLegalIntro: Service contracts are prepared in accordance with the Civil Code of Tajikistan, the Law on Entrepreneurship, and applicable legislation.
orgContractsInvoiceLegalIntro: Invoices are prepared in accordance with the Tax Code of Tajikistan (14% VAT), the Law on Accounting and Financial Reporting, and the service contract.
orgContractsInvoiceRegistrySearchPlaceho: Number, contract, counterparty or payment purpose...
orgContractsBikLookupHint: Data is fetched from the NBT directory (nbt.tj) and Ministry of Finance treasury (moliya.tj).
orgContractsBikLookupSuccess: Bank name and correspondent account filled from BIK.
orgContractsBikInvalidFormat: Invalid BIK format (9 digits, starting with 350101).
orgContractsBikNotFound: BIK not found in the NBT directory.
orgContractsNoInvoices: No invoices yet. Create one from an active contract.
lineItemsRequired: At least one line is required.
lineDescriptionRequired: Service name is required in each line.
legalDocHubSubtitle: Data from official government sites — Majlisi Oli, Government, Ministry of Justice, cfs.tj, edu.tj
legalDocOfficialNote: Documents are sourced from official government websites. Use «Open on official site» for the full text.
legalDocLoadError: Failed to load laws and documents
financeBudgetSubtitle: Annual plan and execution by category
financeBudgetEmpty: Budget data has not been entered yet. Edit → «Add budget tables».
financePayrollSubtitle: Calculated automatically from the staffing table
financeReportsDefaultSummary: Institution financial reports per Instruction №204 (09.04.2015) and PSAS standards.
financeReportsEmptyHint: This section will be prepared according to instructions. Documents and tables will be added later.
financeReportsInstructionTitle: Instruction on preparing and submitting financial reports
financeReportsInstructionIssuer: Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Tajikistan
financeReportsAnnualNote: Annual reporting includes forms №1–№6 and annexes.
financeReportsDeadlineAnnualBody: As of 1 January following the reporting year; submitted on paper and electronically after period close.
financeReportsDeadlineQuarterlyBody: Quarterly by 1 April, semi-annual by 1 July, nine-month by 1 October.
financeReportsDeadlineForm5Body: Submitted by the 10th day of the month following the reporting month.
financeReportsDeadlineForm6Body: Submission deadlines are set by the Ministry of Finance.
financeReportForm1_5: Losses and theft of cash and inventories
financeReportForm1_8: Notes to statement of financial position
financeReportForm2_1: Notes to statement of financial performance
financeReportForm3: Statement of changes in net assets
financeReportForm3_1: Notes to statement of changes in net assets
financeReportForm4_1: Notes to statement of cash flows
financeReportForm5: Revenue and expenditure budget execution report
financeReportForm6: Staffing and contingent plan execution report
financeReportForm5Intro: Revenue and expenditure budget execution table per Form №5 (Instruction №204).
financeReportForm5Hint: Columns: approved plan, revised plan, cash and actual amounts.
financeReportForm5Empty: Form №5 tables are not added yet.
payrollLedgerCommittee: Committee for Food Safety under the Government of Tajikistan
bankPaymentSubtitle: Employer payroll from ledger + social insurance benefits (maternity, sick) — for print and internet banking
bankPaymentNoData: No employees with a payable amount for this month.
bankPaymentMissingAccounts: {count} employee(s) lack a 20-digit bank account — excluded from the Import sheet.
bankPaymentImportHint: The Excel file has two sheets: Print (document) and Import (account, amount, name, purpose — for internet banking).
confirmDeletePayrollLedger: Delete payroll ledger for this month?
positionHandoverDocumentSubtitle: on transfer of duties and service documents
positionHandoverIntro: We, the staff of {organization}, prepared this act to hand over duties effective {date}.
positionHandoverClosing: The listed duties and documents have been fully transferred. There are no claims or objections.
positionHandoverDefaultDuties:
1. Core duties per staffing table
2. Service documents and current records
3. Certificates and latest reports
positionHandoverEmployeesRequired: Select both handing-over and receiving employees
positionHandoverSameEmployee: Handing-over and receiving employee must be different
positionHandoverNeedEmployees: At least 1 active employee is required for the recipient
positionHandoverSalaryPreview: Duty salary: {dutySalary} somoni → allowance: {allowance} somoni ({workedDays} work days of {normDays})
positionHandoverLedgerHintText: After saving, the handover amount is added to the Allowances column for the recipient in the payroll ledger for the effective month. The amount is calculated from worked days since the effective date (from the timesheet).
positionHandoverSavedLedgerMonth: Saved. Payroll ledger for {month} was updated — handover allowance was added to the Allowances column for the recipient.
laborLeaveDocumentSubtitle: on granting labor leave to an employee
laborLeaveIntro: {organization} grants employee {employee} «{leaveType}» leave from {startDate} to {endDate} for {days} days.
laborLeaveClosing: This order shall be executed. Information shall be submitted to accounting and HR.
laborLeaveDefaultReason: In accordance with labor law and the employee's request
laborLeaveInvalidDates: End date must be after start date
laborLeaveNeedEmployees: At least 1 active employee is required
laborLeaveSalaryPeriodHint: Per Labor Code Art. 172 and Govt. Decree No. 313 (01.06.2007): total accrued ÷ months ÷ 29.3 × calendar leave days (excluding holidays). 15th-day rule: before the 15th the current month is excluded; on or after the 15th it is included.
laborLeavePayPreviewText: Average salary: {average} somoni ({includesCurrent}). Daily: {daily} (÷ {days}). {leaveDays} leave days (excl. {holidaysExcluded} holidays) = {amount} somoni{fallback}
laborLeaveStateInsuranceNote: Maternity/sick leave is paid from state social insurance (Labor Code Art. 113) — not entered in the employer payroll ledger.
laborLeavePayPreviewEmpty: Select employee, paid leave type, and dates to calculate
laborLeaveSavedLedgerMonth: Saved. Payroll ledger for {month} updated — full calculated amount added to the Leave Pay column.
laborLeavePayLedgerHint: The full amount from the calculation is posted to the payroll ledger only in the leave start month.
maternityLeavePeriodHint: Labor Code Art. 91: 70 days before birth + postpartum period per birth type.
maternityLeaveBenefitPreviewText: Average over {months} months: {totalWages} somoni ÷ {workingDays} working days = {daily} daily × {leaveDays} calendar days (Labor Code Art. 91) = {amount} somoni{fallback}. Before birth: {daysBefore} days, after: {daysAfter} days.
maternityLeaveDefaultReason: Per Labor Code Art. 91 and medical certificate
maternityLeaveDocumentSubtitle: on granting maternity and childbirth leave to an employee
maternityLeaveIntro: {organization} grants employee {employee} maternity and childbirth leave ({variant}) from {startDate} to {endDate} for {days} days. Expected date of birth: {expectedBirthDate}.
maternityLeaveSavedLedgerMonth: Saved. Payroll ledger for {month} updated — leave days excluded from worked days.
maternityLeaveBenefitHint: Benefit is paid from state social insurance (Labor Code Art. 113). Average salary from 3 months before leave: total accrued ÷ working days × leave days.
sickLeaveCertificateRequired: Enter the sick leave certificate number
sickLeaveBenefitPreviewText: Monthly wage: {monthlyWage} somoni × {percent}% ÷ {workingDays} work days = {daily} per day × {sickDays} sick days = {amount} somoni.{capNote}{floorNote}
sickLeaveBenefitFormulaShort: monthly wage × percent ÷ working days × sick days
sickLeaveCategoryUnder8: 60% — under 8 years of service (Insurance Law art.12)
sickLeaveTuberculosis: Tuberculosis (up to 12 months — Labor Code art.217)
sickLeaveWageCappedNote: Monthly wage capped at 2× duty salary (Decree №313, §16).
sickLeaveMinFloorNote: Minimum wage floor applied (Labor Code art.217).
sickLeaveDurationWarning: Warning: sick leave exceeds {max} months (Labor Code art.217). Refer employee to medical-labor commission.
sickLeaveDefaultReason: Per Labor Code art.217, Insurance Law art.12 and Gov. Decree №313
sickLeaveIntro: {organization} employee {employee} is temporarily disabled from {startDate} to {endDate} for {days} days. Certificate no.: {certificate}.
sickLeaveSavedLedgerMonth: Saved. Payroll ledger for {month} updated — sick days marked «б» in the timesheet.
sickLeaveBenefitHint: Benefit from the Social Protection Fund (Labor Code art.217). Decree №313 §14: monthly wage ÷ norm working days × sick working days × percent (60–100%). Rest days excluded. §16: max 2× duty salary (except injury/occupational disease).
funeralAllowancePayeeRequired: For employer budget payment, select a payee employee
funeralAllowanceBenefitHint: Labor Code art. 220: funeral allowance = 20× calculation indicator. For 2025 — 75 somoni × 20 = 1,500 somoni. Paid via social insurance for low-income families or from employer budget per government resolution.
funeralAllowanceDefaultReason: Per Labor Code art. 220, Social Insurance Law art. 16, and the government resolution on funeral allowance payment
funeralAllowanceIntro: {organization} shall pay {payee} {amount} somoni for the funeral of {deceased} (date of death: {deathDate}) as of {paymentDate}.
funeralAllowanceLedgerHintText: After saving, the amount is added to the «Funeral» column in the payroll ledger for the payment month.
funeralAllowanceSavedLedgerMonth: Saved. Payroll ledger for {month} updated — funeral allowance added to the corresponding column.
financeReportsOverviewHint: Choose a subsection from the Financial reports menu on the left: forms №1–№6, annual and quarterly reports, submission deadlines.
formationReportSubheading: per staffing schedule and employee registry
formationReportSubtitle: Staff quota vs active employees and vacancies
formationReportNoStaff: Staff & HR section data is required for this report.
formationReportNoData: Staffing schedule table is empty — fill in the schedule first.
sectionSaveError: Could not save. Please try again.
staffAutoCalcHint: Harmful-work allowance = salary × percent. Monthly wage = (salary + allowance + driving/night) × staff count. When staff changes, monthly wage and totals update automatically.
noStaffingForSelect: Fill in the staffing table first — department and position are selected from it
wageScaleKindergartenDirectorNote: In kindergarten the director only leads — duty salary is 0 somoni
staffScheduleGroupedHint: Each department shows its staffing table, employees, and vacancies together.
staffVacancyGroupedHint: Vacancies are shown under each department.
staffVacancyDeptHint: {count} vacancies total — see details under each department.
timesheetSubtitle: Track working days and absences for employees
timesheetAutoFillHint: Holiday on a workday lowers the norm; holiday on a weekend transfers to the next workday («в»). «в» syncs for all and does not reduce salary.
timesheetSavedHint: Timesheet saved. Click Edit to make changes.
confirmDeleteTimesheet: Delete the timesheet for this month?
timesheetTransferredRestTitle: Transferred rest day (holiday fell on weekend)
staffScheduleEmpty: Staffing schedule has not been entered yet. Edit → «Add staffing table».
staffAllPositionsFilled: All positions are filled according to staffing
staffPositionFull: Staff quota for this position is full
vacancyNoticeCommittee: Food Safety Committee under the Government of the Republic of Tajikistan
vacancyNoticeContact: For more information and document submission, contact:
vacancyNoticeFooter: This notice is prepared based on the staffing table and employee registry.
vacancyNoticeDefaultIntro: According to the approved staffing table, the following vacant positions are available at the Food Safety Center.
vacancyNoticeDefaultRequirements: Requirements: secondary vocational or higher education (as per position), relevant work experience, knowledge of Tajikistan food safety legislation.
